description.value: KiTEC Industries (India) Private Limited is a manufacturer based in Silvassa, Vapi, providing better solutions for small diameter piping systems, including high-quality Brass Internal Sealing Fittings. The company has been recognized with the ASSOCHAM Global Quality Excellence SME of the Year award, is a recipient of the ESQR Award 2025, and is an IGBC Member, reflecting its commitment to quality and sustainable practices.

address.value: 8, Madhuban Industrial Area, Madhuban Dam Road, Rakholi, Silvassa, Dadra And Nagar Haveli, Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu, 396230

bio.value: Water is Precious, do not waste it.. Use KiTEC..
